rationale: Educ. Code §48.317 governs third grade supplementary support grants and entitlement reductions based on student assessment performance. Itdoes not reference or depend on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict.
quote: Subject to Subsection (d), beginning with the 2030-2031 school year, the agency shall reduce the school district's entitlement under this chapter each school year by the total amount of grant money received by a student under Subsection (a)
_note: No direct statutory linkage between §48.317 and Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue is not a textual conflict with this provision.
